nasb.text: So all the peoples of the earth will see that you are called by the name of the Lord, and they will be afraid of you.

esv.text: And all the peoples of the earth shall see that you are called by the name of the Lord, and they shall be afraid of you.

cnv.text: 地上萬民見你被稱為耶和華名下的人，就必懼怕你。

ccb.text: 天下万民将看出你们是耶和华的子民，并惧怕你们。
